title: Update Settings
description: Configure SeLoger Search Export scraper settings

content.introduction: Configure your SeLoger Search Export squid settings. Control pagination and enable detail page enrichment to get full descriptions and geographic coordinates.

scraperParams.title: Scraper Parameters
scraperParams.content: Set these parameters in the `params` object:

rows.description: Maximum number of search result pages to crawl
Visit each listing's detail page to fetch full description, coordinates (lat/lng), and extra attributes
Display name for your squid configuration

proTips.content: Enable `functions.annonce_details` to get full property descriptions and exact GPS coordinates.
Enabling `annonce_details` increases run time as each listing requires an additional HTTP request.
Use `max_pages` to limit the scope of large searches and control credit usage.

seo.title: Update Settings - SeLoger Search Export - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure SeLoger Search Export scraper settings using the lobstr.io API.
